zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Foljambe於1386年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈索普時，她的父親Sir Godfrey Foljambe III19歲，母親Margaret Leeke20歲。她於1403年6月16日與William Plumpton在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1416年在英國越可爾斯波福斯享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Foljambe于1386年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈索普时，她的父亲Sir Godfrey Foljambe III19岁，母亲Margaret Leeke20岁。她于1403年6月16日与William Plumpton在英国越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1416年在英国越可爾斯波福斯享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foljambe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French fol ‘foolish, silly’ + jambe ‘leg’, probably a nickname for a lame person, someone with a maimed or crooked leg; compare Belgian . In Old French fol could be used of something useless or of little value, e.g. farine folle ‘mill dust’.

variants.name: Fulljames
meanings: English: variant of Foljambe with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Belgian
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: nickname from Anglo-Norman French bele jambe ‘fine leg’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Foljambe was born in 1386, in Hassop, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Godfrey Foljambe III, was 19 and her mother, Margaret Leeke, was 20. She married William Plumpton on 16 June 1403, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1416, in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Foljambe est née en 1386, à Hassop, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Godfrey Foljambe III, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret Leeke, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Plumpton le 16 juin 1403, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1416, à Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Foljambe 1386 in Hassop, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Godfrey Foljambe III 19 und ihre Mutter Margaret Leeke 20. Sie hat am 16. Juni 1403 in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England William Plumpton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1416 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Foljambe è nata il nel 1386 nel Hassop, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Godfrey Foljambe III, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Margaret Leeke, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Plumpton il 16 giugno 1403, nel Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1416, nel Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Foljambeが1386年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハソップで生まれた時，父Sir Godfrey Foljambe IIIは19歳，母Margaret Leekeは20歳であった。1403年6月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースでWilliam Plumptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1416年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスプオフォースで31歳で死去した。

ko.Plympton Saint Mary, Plymouth, Devonshir: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림프턴 스트 메리

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Foljambe(이)가 1386년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하소프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Godfrey Foljambe III(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Leeke(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1403년 6월 16일 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 William Plumpton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1416년 영국 요르크실르 스포포스에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Foljambe nasceu em 1386, em Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Godfrey Foljambe III, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Leeke, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Plumpton em 16 de junho de 1403, em Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1416, em Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 31 anos.

ru.Plumpton , Yorkshire, England: плумптон би экклесалл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Foljambe родилась в 1386 г. в местности хассоп, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Godfrey Foljambe III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Leeke, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Plumpton 16 июня 1403 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1416 г. в местности споффорт, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Foljambe nació en 1386, en Hassop, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Godfrey Foljambe III, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret Leeke, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Plumpton el 16 de junio de 1403, en Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1416, en Spofforth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años.
